category_sources: Official SourceForge code README at https://sourceforge.net/p/jpdfbookmarks/githublink/ci/main/tree/README states the software creates and edits bookmarks on existing PDF files.
source_facts.description says 'Create and edit bookmarks on existing PDF files'.
display_name_sources: Official SourceForge project and code pages use the project name 'JPdfBookmarks'.
docs_sources: Official SourceForge code README contains description, install, execute, build, and packaging sections.
Official SourceForge project provides a Wiki tab for documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was determined from the official SourceForge project Code tab labeled 'JPdfBookmarks 3 (Git)' at https://sourceforge.net/p/jpdfbookmarks/githublink/ci/main/tree/.
source_facts.source-archive is hosted under the official SourceForge jpdfbookmarks project.
tags_sources: Official SourceForge README documents command line or GUI use and Java runtime requirements.
